Product Details
Automotive Oil Seals

Sealing solutions engineered around automotive temperatures, fluid compatibility, and contamination exclusion requirements.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Automotive Oil Seals

Suitable for engines, transmissions, wheel ends, and auxiliary systems that need dependable leakage control.

Automotive Oil Seals focus on stable lip sealing, fluid compatibility, and exclusion of road contaminants to support durable operation in vehicle assemblies.

Vehicle Operating Conditions

Designed around wide temperature swings, lubrication media, and continuous rotary service.

Contamination Exclusion

Helps resist dirt, splash, and road debris entering wheel-end or drivetrain sealing positions.

Extended Service

Suitable for replacement and OEM-support scenarios that value stable sealing life.
